findings.summary: Modular synth delay module (PT2399-based, 186 components). False parallel capacitor groupings in PT2399 RC networks inflate capacitance values. Op-amp integrator misclassified as compensator. GND-base transistors accumulate false driver lists.

correct.description: Op-amp circuits for TL072/TL074 correctly identified with inverting/non-inverting configurations
PT2399 delay ICs correctly classified as ICs

incorrect.description: 21 of 45 RC filter entries contain false parallel capacitor groupings — caps on different PT2399 nodes (pins 13/14 and separate filter stages) incorrectly combined, producing wrong capacitance and cutoff values

suggestions: RC filter parallel-cap detection should verify both caps share the same two terminal nodes, not just one shared node
